title: Burndown charts do not show for guests

posts.author: bruno.gorga (Bruno Gorga)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello dear community,

I am with a situation within my monday dev regarding burndown charts.

Have a paid user account within my organization’s account, and I was trying to check how would an invited guest see the work done on my project, so I created a guest account with a personal email.

I noticed thereafter that on my guest account the Burndown chart was not showing any information, despite it being shown in my user account. The sprint performance chart was showing normally on both accounts.

Please see the image below showing how my guest account sees my Sprint performance tab.

image1246×816 38 KB

And, below, how my main user account sees it:

image1206×816 44.7 KB

Anyone knows if it is still not available for guests to see the burndown chart? Any kind of turnaroud maybe?

Thanks in advance
